ai_summary: JSW Infrastructure Limited (JSWIL) has incorporated a wholly-owned subsidiary, JSW Kolkata Outer Harbour Container Terminal Private Limited, on July 10, 2026. This new entity serves as a Special Purpose Vehicle (SPV) to execute a previously awarded concession for the integrated development of an outer container terminal and berths at Netaji Subhash Dock, Kolkata, under a Design Build Finance Operate Transfer (DBFOT) public-private partnership. The incorporation, requiring a nominal initial capital of Rs. 1 lakh, formalizes JSWIL's operational structure for a key port infrastructure project and presents no immediate red flags.
